description_long: This is a two-story rectangular bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and a concrete base, featuring a gray gabled roof. The front facade has a central wooden door with a large arched window above it, flanked by two tall, conical evergreen trees and flower beds. The windows are symmetrically arranged with wooden frames, and the exterior walls are clad in vertical beige siding with a horizontal dark trim separating the two floors. The fenced yard includes a small garden area with colorful flowers and a decorative mailbox at the entrance. The property is bordered by a brown wooden fence with a double-gate entry at the front. The overall appearance is neat and suburban, with landscaping elements enhancing the residential feel.
description: A two-story rectangular bungalow with a gray gabled roof, beige siding, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard with landscaped gardens and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched window, two tall trees, flower beds, and the double-gate fence.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the side windows, garden area, and the continuation of the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain siding, two windows, and the back section of the fence.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a single window, the side of the house, and the two tall trees near the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with regular side and rear windows
